name: MILES: Modular Instruction Memory with Learnable Selection for Self-Improving LLM Reasoning (2607.06974)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: LLMs increasingly improve reasoning at test time via additional computation. MILES is a framework that dynamically expands step-wise memory and applies correctness-optimized memory composition under test-time constraints. It maintains modular memory units of asymmetric sub-goal embeddings and sub-instructions with learnable selection heads.
